summary: Add runtime MCP mirror coverage for Amazon Ads novel commands.
reason: The static tools manifest only lists generated endpoint tools, while the MCP server exposes novel Cobra commands through the runtime cobratree mirror.
validated_outcome: go test ./internal/mcp ./internal/mcp/cobratree passes; the MCP server handles initialize and tools/list, exposes code-orchestration/framework/novel runtime tools, and marks automation tools destructive/open-world.
